description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a dark, weathered finish and a cylindrical shape that tapers from a thick barrel to a narrower handle. The barrel is embedded with numerous large, sharp metal spikes protruding outward in all directions, giving it a menacing, weaponized appearance. The handle is wrapped in a dark, textured grip, likely for improved handling and comfort. The wood shows signs of wear, scratches, and some dark stains, possibly simulating dried blood or heavy use. There are no visible brand logos or manufacturer markings on the bat. The end cap is rounded and appears to be a simple continuation of the wood, with no distinct separation or design.
description: A weathered wooden baseball bat with a spiked barrel and a dark, textured grip. The bat is heavily worn and has no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bat, with spikes on the barrel clearly visible and the handle grip prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding spikes on the right side of the barrel and the tapering handle.
description_view_2: Rear view with spikes visible on both sides of the barrel and the worn wood texture apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the spikes on the left side of the barrel and the dark grip wrapping.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip tape is dark, possibly black or brown, with a rough, textured appearance and a simple spiral wrap. No visible designs or logos.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, made of the same wood as the bat, with no distinct separation, markings, or logos.
